trigger: loop-backlog has successfully merged the task branch into main

context.description: After a successful git merge, loop-backlog must set the task status to Done. The Done status must NOT be set before the merge completes successfully.

required_sequence.pattern: backlog task edit TASK-XX.*Done|backlog task move.*Done
required_sequence.description: Set Done status only after successful merge

forbidden_before_step_1.pattern: backlog task edit TASK-XX.*Done|backlog task move.*Done
forbidden_before_step_1.description: Must not set Done before merge succeeds
